title: teucrium vesicarium var. palustre
intro: Teucrium vesicarium var. palustre, also known as Marsh Germander or Marsh Teucrium, is a perennial plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Teucrium vesicarium var. palustre is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its essential oil is also extracted for its therapeutic properties.
